title: Free scan POST /v1/audit/scan returns full paid report envelope (revenue leak)
fix: Gate before returning envelope; unpaid+no-active-subscription returns summary stub only (readiness_pct, blocking_count, by_severity), zero findings/frameworks/evidence_tier. Force report checkout ($750) or Continuous subscription.

title: GET /v1/audit/sessions/:id/report returns ungated envelope (json/html/pdf)
fix: Apply same tier/payment gate as A1; unpaid -> 403 directing to checkout or Continuous.

title: GET /v1/audit/sessions/:id/export returns ungated GRC artifacts (csv/xlsx/drata/vanta)
fix: Apply tier/payment gate before _sendExport; enforce paid tier=='report' or active Continuous.

title: Envelope content not differentiated by tier (watermark is cosmetic only)
fix: When tier=='scan', emit summary-only envelope BEFORE signing (omit findings/evidence detail); keep signature valid over reduced payload. Paid path emits full envelope.

title: Deep Red-Team ($10,000) product missing from catalog and webhook fulfillment
fix: Add redteam product {amount_cents:1000000, kolm_product:'asr_redteam', price_env:'KOLM_STRIPE_PRICE_ASR_DEEP_REDTEAM'} and webhook branch for asrKind=='asr_redteam'.

title: Reviewed Attestation ($25,000) product missing from catalog and webhook fulfillment
fix: Add reviewed product {amount_cents:2500000, kolm_product:'asr_reviewed', price_env:'KOLM_STRIPE_PRICE_ASR_REVIEWED'} and webhook branch for asrKind=='asr_reviewed' activating co-signer entitlement.

title: Timing attack on admin key comparison (strict equality)
Missing GET /v1/audit/sessions list endpoint (customers cannot view purchased audits)
fix: Implement GET /v1/audit/sessions (auth-gated, tenant-fenced) returning sessions[] {id,tenant_id,product_key,status,created_at,last_run_at,public_slug}; register in router.js.

title: Automations use in-memory Map in production (data loss on restart)
fix: Register account UI routes with deps {authMiddleware, eventStore:{appendEvent,listEvents}, runRecipe, cronSecret:process.env.KOLM_CRON_SECRET}.

title: storeEphemeral() not surfaced in /health (silent paid-data-loss blind spot)
fix: Import storeEphemeral; add store_ephemeral field to /health body. Live deploy currently durable (volume mounted /app/data), so this is a fail-loudly safety-net blocker.

title: Forbidden 'honesty' terminology exposed via public GET /v1/changelog
fix: Replace 'honesty' tags with 'transparency'/'full-disclosure'; rewrite 'honesty:' footer and 'honesty contract'; re-render built changelog HTML.

title: Forbidden 'honest'/'honesty' in customer-facing public docs (api-routes.json, openapi.json)
fix: Replace 'honest'/'honesty' in generating source (router.js route comments + build-api-ref.cjs/build-openapi.cjs) with accurate/correct/candid/transparent; regenerate; add build-time BANNED check.

title: Personal email rodneyyesep@gmail.com in operator-visible Cloudflare config doc
fix: Replace with dev@kolm.ai; sweep repo for any other rodneyyesep occurrence.

title: Forbidden contact emails returned in API responses (sales@/hello@/leaderboard@)
fix: Replace all with dev@kolm.ai; extract to CONFIG.SUPPORT_EMAIL; add CI grep gate.

title: Setup-token reveal feature unwired; signup welcome emails ship raw API keys in plaintext
fix: Implement /v1/setup/reveal (one-shot key reveal) and /v1/forgot-key; change tEmailSignup to link /setup?token=<tok> instead of embedding raw key.

title: Missing integration test proving revenue gate (regression lock for A1-A3)
fix: Verify unpaid tenant cannot see findings/frameworks via scan/report/export; paid tenant can; Continuous subscriber can export.
